author: alexbieg
description: A command palette that does all of the things you want it to do.

manifest.author: Alex Bieg
manifest.description: A command palette that does all of the things you want it to do.
manifest.name: Better Command Palette

name: Better Command Palette

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fixes custom File search prefix when searching from the tag modal by @AlexBieg in https://github.com/AlexBieg/obsidian-better-command-palette/pull/74
* Add hotkeys for switching search type while the palette is open by @AlexBieg in https://github.com/AlexBieg/obsidian-better-command-palette/pull/82
* Hide modal header based on setting by @AlexBieg in https://github.com/AlexBieg/obsidian-better-command-palette/pull/83
* Surface recent items during all phases of search by @AlexBieg in https://github.com/AlexBieg/obsidian-better-command-palette/pull/84
* Add a setting to hide files with specified extensions by @AlexBieg in https://github.com/AlexBieg/obsidian-better-command-palette/pull/85
* Fix renamed macros persisting in the command palette by @AlexBieg in https://github.com/AlexBieg/obsidian-better-command-palette/pull/86


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AlexBieg/obsidian-better-command-palette/compare/0.14.0...0.15.0
